headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW) Stock After Recent Performance And Interest Rate Sensitivity Headlines
summary: If you are wondering whether Charles Schwab is priced fairly or offering value right now, the stock's recent moves and current valuation signals give you some useful clues to work with. At a last close of US$91.70, Charles Schwab has returned 0.7% over the past week and 1.7% over the last month, while the year to date return is down 9.7% and the 1 year return is 4.1%, compared with 79.9% over 3 years and 32.8% over 5 years.
